metadata.rulesText:
R, T, Discard a card: Destroy target blue permanent.

5RR, T, Discard a card: Jaya Ballard deals 6 damage to each creature and each player.

metadata.rulesText: If a red instant or sorcery spell you control would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead.
metadata.flavorText:
"Elemental fire shimmers with rose hues and, unlike terrestrial blazes, smolders long after it's extinguished."
—Jestus Dreya, Of Elements and Eternity

metadata.rulesText:
(R/W): Figure of Destiny becomes a 2/2 Kithkin Spirit.
(R/W)(R/W)(R/W): If Figure of Destiny is a Spirit, it becomes a 4/4 Kithkin Spirit Warrior.
(R/W)(R/W)(R/W)(R/W)(R/W)(R/W): If Figure of Destiny is a Warrior, it becomes an 8/8 Kithkin Spirit Warrior Avatar with flying and first strike.
